home.heroSubtitle: Expert translation for high-stakes documentation, including financial records, medical reports, and legal contracts. Specialized solutions for international real estate investors.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Bridging the gap between languages with absolute accuracy.
about.content: Lawrence Corporate Translations Ltd is a premier language service provider specializing in complex legal and financial documentation. Founded on the principles of meticulous detail and confidentiality, we provide certified translations recognized by major institutions, government authorities, and legal bodies worldwide. Whether navigating international real estate acquisitions or translating sensitive medical data, our mission is to ensure your message retains its power and legal standing in every language.

services.heroSubtitle: Precision-driven language solutions tailored for corporate and private sectors.
services.cardContent1: Certified translation of 106 forms, bank statements, and pay stubs for capital verification and international investments.
services.cardContent2: Expert translation of medical diagnoses, clinical trials, and discharge summaries with total terminological accuracy.
services.cardContent3: Professional translation of engagement agreements, business contracts, and binding legal instruments.
services.cardContent4: Translation of diplomas, marriage licenses, and IDs. Notary coordination available through our strategic partners.
services.cardContent5: Rigorous proofreading and editing to ensure your documents meet the highest global standards of clarity.
services.cardContent6: Localizing business video content through precise transcription and time-coded subtitling solutions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Reach out today for a professional consultation or a direct quote.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.content: We are committed to digital inclusivity, ensuring our website is accessible to all users in accordance with Israeli Standard TI 5568 (Level AA).
